purpose: Collect public-source prior-art seeds for later formal search result packages, nonlegal comparison review and patent-counsel review. This artifact is not a legal opinion and does not establish novelty, inventiveness, patentability or field evidence.

boundary.evidence_boundary: These rows are external source-basis seeds and risk hypotheses only. They must not be copied into formal_search_result_package as accepted hits without actual reviewer-filled hit tables and claim element comparison rows.

patentability_reference_seeds.label: WIPO patent protection FAQ
patentability_reference_seeds.rule_summary: Patent examination commonly considers patentable subject matter, novelty, inventive step/non-obviousness, industrial applicability and sufficient disclosure.
patentability_reference_seeds.project_constraint: Claims should be written as implementable water-treatment system structure, state variables, control actions and validation gates, not as abstract AI functions.

patentability_reference_seeds.label: Patent Law of the People's Republic of China translation
patentability_reference_seeds.rule_summary: Chinese invention and utility model patentability turns on novelty, inventiveness and practical applicability.
patentability_reference_seeds.project_constraint: The disclosure must distinguish the proposed chain from known soft-sensor, MARL, flowsheet-modeling and water-plant diagnosis systems.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: EP2414901B1 water purification soft sensor/control system
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Water purification system using real-time sensors, COD soft sensor, state estimator, event predictor and controller.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Soft sensor plus state estimation plus control cannot be claimed as a standalone invention.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Low-cost sparse node-modality sensing, cyclic low-frequency evidence window, field replay/operator/release gate and protective no-write candidate boundary.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Claim element chart comparing COD soft sensor, estimator and predictor with the seven-layer gated chain.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: WO2019071384A1 intelligent diagnosis/control in water or wastewater plants
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Data acquisition, diagnosis, anomaly detection and control for water or wastewater treatment plants.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Broad intelligent diagnosis and dynamic control language may be anticipated or obvious.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Constrain claims to low-cost limited observations, cyclic/holding windows, same-batch field replay evidence bundles, operator review and protective candidate evaluation.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Compare the patent's control claims with R8p/R8v/R8u-56 gate sequence.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: Advances in soft sensors for WWTPs systematic review
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Soft sensors for WWTP monitoring have evolved from mechanism models to machine-learning approaches.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Predicting difficult-to-measure water-quality variables is not novel by itself.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Soft sensor outputs are bounded by uncertainty, grey-box residuals, field holdout and release-gate abstention.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Field holdout interval coverage, OOD or abstention rate and release-gate no-write proof.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: Soft sensor enabled real-time chemical dosing control
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Soft sensor used for full-scale real-time chemical dosing control.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Soft sensor plus dosing control is a strong adjacent prior-art family.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Multiple protective candidate actions: hold, recycle, retention extension, dose candidate, catalyst regeneration/replacement review, unit switch and release blocking.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Compare single-variable dosing control against multi-facility protective candidate action bundle and gates.

prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Sparse sensor placement for reconstruction/classification using basis and greedy/QR-style methods.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Sparse sensor placement optimization is not novel in isolation.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Sensor placement is tied to pollutant-process hidden states, cost/maintenance constraints, soft-sensor uncertainty and downstream control promotion gates.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Agent48 baseline comparison: random, cost-only, greedy, SSPOR-like and topology-aware with real topology/labels.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for sustainable WWTP optimal control
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: MADDPG/MARL applied to WWTP aeration/chemical control with sustainability reward signals.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for WWTP optimization is already public.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Agents generate only protected candidates constrained by grey-box, KG, field replay, operator review and release/actuator gates.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Agent49/52 comparisons against unguarded MARL, rules and guardrail-aware replay with false-action costs.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: Multi-agent AI reinforcement full-scale WWTP digital multi-solution
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Multi-agent reinforcement operation optimization across influent conditions in full-scale WWTP context.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Full-scale multi-agent WWTP optimal operation has prior art.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Focus on low-cost sensor insufficiency, cyclic evidence windows, evidence stratification and template/synthetic no-write gates.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Compare full-scale optimal operation claims with field package and release-gate requirements.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: MARL integrated real-time control for urban drainage systems
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for coordinated sewer, WWTP and receiving-water control.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Multi-facility collaborative control for water systems is public prior art.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: The project should claim treatment-unit internal cyclic grey-box protective control under limited observation, not generic urban drainage MARL.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: System-boundary, action-granularity, evidence-gate and low-cost-sensing comparison.

prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: EPANET-style water network simulation with pipes, pumps, valves, tanks, hydraulics, quality and resilience actions.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Network topology and hydraulic simulation are mature external methods.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Use graph/topology ideas only as priors for reactor/treatment-unit recirculation and pollutant-state estimation.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: site_topology_or_bed_geometry, flow/HRT/RTD and pressure/headloss field rows.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: WaterTAP process and network modeling documentation
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Water treatment process, unit and network modeling for design, optimization, costing and energy analysis.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Flowsheet/process optimization and costing are not novel alone.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Use process priors inside a low-cost observation, evidence-gated control system rather than claiming high-fidelity flowsheet modeling.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Unit model parameters, inlet/outlet pollutants, reagent/energy values and field calibration ranges.

prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Process modeling, system simulation, techno-economic analysis and life-cycle assessment for sanitation/resource recovery.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: System simulation and TEA/LCA are known frameworks.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Treat TEA/LCA as reward and engineering constraint fields, not as the core invention.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: CAPEX/OPEX, reagent, energy, maintenance, regeneration and byproduct-risk tables.

prior_art_seed_rows.source_label: Conservative Q-Learning and D4RL offline RL benchmark
prior_art_seed_rows.known_prior_capability: Offline RL and fixed benchmark datasets for conservative policy evaluation.
prior_art_seed_rows.project_risk: Replay/offline policy evaluation is not novel alone.
prior_art_seed_rows.distinguishing_combination: Replay is used as a safety/evidence gate before actuator or release promotion, not as automatic online policy training.
prior_art_seed_rows.needed_next_evidence: Field state-action-reward replay, operator labels, action outcomes and unsafe-action blockers.

avoid_as_primary_claims: using AI for wastewater treatment control
using multi-agent systems for water-treatment optimization
using soft sensors to predict water quality
using knowledge graphs to explain pollutant-material relations
using sparse sensor placement to reduce cost
recommended_independent_chain: construct node-modality observation matrix for treatment units, topology and cyclic/holding structures
estimate hidden process states from low-cost sensors, missingness/delay/noise, offline labels and grey-box priors
constrain diagnosis through KG/source-basis and grey-box mechanism boundaries
generate protective control candidates rather than actuator commands
promote candidates only through field package, same-batch replay, operator review, release gate and actuator safety interlock
choose recycle, retention extension, hold, dosing candidate, catalyst regeneration/replacement candidate, unit switch candidate or release blocking based on gate status

next_actions: If real data is available, run R7/R8p field package import and validation.
If no real data is available, upgrade Agent48/49/52 to comparable placement/replay baselines rather than adding agents.
Prepare a true FORMAL_SEARCH_RESULT_PACKAGE_PATH only with actual search hits and reviewer-filled comparison rows; do not treat this seed matrix as accepted prior-art evidence.
